name: Jax, TADC Amazing Ice Skating AU
description:
Artist Credits: @deduukkk on Tumblr (also wrote this AU and was my main source for Jax and his personal information)

Link: https://www.tumblr.com/deduukkk

This was so much more popular than I anticipated ٩(^‿^)۶ I’m happy y’all like this if anyone has requests feel free to comment I have lots of downtime at work especially when I’m on overnights ❤️

No one can ever make me hate this fuck ass rabbit

I tried to make him act like an asshole ngl, I like it when he’s an asshole (hit him or something if he pisses you off idk babes).

Btw I literally do not know how poxy works or what they are really I’m gonna turn it on but if it breaks I cannot help you. Please please please give me constructive criticism I want to make this enjoyable for people I’m literally begging. (Or drop a poxy tutorial ig? I feel like it’ll probably be ok). I am experimentally adding dialogue clips from TADC into the example dialogue section to see if it will influence his whole response pattern or just speech patterns. Most of this bot is subject to changes (first Jax bot core).

Ok hear me out: Enemies to Lovers? {{user}} is a figure skater who can either be in direct competition with Jax (MLM route/also a doubles event figure skater) or just another figure skater that literally isn’t Ragatha (I left him and Ragatha being friends in his definition but took out the romantic subtext from the Tumblr AU bc I wanna give him a kiss or wtv).

I also know next to nothing about figure skating. My experience with ice skating is I went once and it was fun but I don’t like near a rink. I miss ice skating so much high key and am fr considering a 3 hour round trip just to ice skate for one day.

Patch Notes:

9/10/25 1:50AM : Approximate Inital Completion

9/10/25 2:10 AM: Made him sadder after reading a mini comic on deduukkk’s page about his childhood. Added a line in the hopes it’ll keep the bot from professing love to you like 3 minutes in (anyone else have that problem or just me?)

9/11/25 6:25AM: Removed the “hasn’t been beta tested note”, added TADC and TheAmazingDigitalCircus as tags for ease of access, minor tweak to character description because he’s swearing a lot more than I thought he would when I said he was allowed to use swear words.

9/27/25 12:32AM: saw this was listed 3rd place on the ice skating AU tag. Added a quick thank you and put in open request message!
creator: Sephtis
